pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic - XML template created fresh from bash heredoc in setup_task.sh
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates portfolio XML from template, not downloaded or loaded from external source

privileged_info_summary: The task uses Portfolio Performance, a real open-source portfolio tracking application that stores data in XML format. All task data is synthetic, with the portfolio file initially containing 350,000 EUR in cash. The task expects a security called 'Oak Street Rental Property' to be created and purchased on 2024-01-15 for 285,000 EUR, with 6 rental income dividend payments of 1,200 EUR each from February-July 2024, and two property value appraisals at 288,000 EUR (2024-03-31) and 291,500 EUR (2024-06-30). All values in task.json metadata are verified as hardcoded and internally consistent with task scripts and verifier logic.
